title: Hiring Software Engineer at Practo Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Practo Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Practo Advisory Limited family as a Software Engineer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
